commit.subject: LU-16425 tests: skip recovery-small test_144a in interop
commit.message:
LU-16425 tests: skip recovery-small test_144a in interop

test_144a was added after 2.15.1, skip it for older version

Lustre-change: https://review.whamcloud.com/47006

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=recovery-small env=ONLY=144a serverversion=2.14.0

Change-Id: I4652f2021fdfd114466c3760d39ae69d16ea1521
Signed-off-by: Wei Liu <sarah@whamcloud.com>
